diagrams.title: Language Classes Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between Regular, CFL, and Recursive/RE language classes
diagrams.purpose: Understand decidability boundaries and class inclusions

diagrams.title: Halting Problem Proof Flow
diagrams.description: Turing's diagonalization proof structure showing contradiction
elements: Build D using H: if H says halts, D loops
diagrams.purpose: Visualize proof by contradiction used in undecidability

diagrams.title: Rice's Theorem Classification
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing trivial vs non-trivial properties
elements: Left branch: Trivial (decidable) - empty or universal
Properties of TM description (not language) can be decidable
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for applying Rice's Theorem

diagrams.title: RE/Recursive Language Relationship
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing RE, co-RE, and recursive languages
elements: Intersection: Both RE and co-RE = Recursive
Halting problem region: RE only, not co-RE
